courseTitle: Game Feel, UI, Audio, and Visual Communication
title: Polished Micro-Arcade Cabinet
genericDescription: Combine game feel, UI, audio, and presentation; design for public play; present a coherent brand identity.
specificDescription: Build a polished arcade-style game with title treatment, attract loop, tutorial prompt, sound mix, score feedback, and end screen. It must be understandable from a standing demo station.
gradingRubric: 30 pts complete audiovisual polish; 20 pts onboarding; 20 pts game feel; 15 pts public-play readiness; 15 pts documentation.
